title: Services Revenue Center Playbook
description: Move post-sales support toward a services revenue center: after documentation, process, and metrics exist, add warranty/license renewal programs, billable services, and clear enforcement so value is not only absorbed as cost of doing business.

mindset.principle: You cannot price chaos. Build the foundation, then graduate to revenue without turning every call into a shakedown.

mistakes.label: Bill before tickets close and quality exists
Never productize renewals or billable work
mistakes.cost: Support stays a black hole in finance eyes

stages.label: Docs, process, metrics, closure, portal basics
Consistent warranty/license renewal program and owner
Menu of out-of-warranty and consult services
Services recognized as a business unit path

decision_branches.situation: Want revenue but ops still chaotic

steps.name: Publish billable menu
steps.goal: Clear SKUs and when free vs paid

agent_signal.use_when: Support is only a cost center. Need path to services revenue: renewals, billable work, warranty enforcement after process foundation exists.
decision_criteria: Renewals are a program with an owner.
Billable menu explicit; free vs paid rules written.
agent_signal.operator_context: Field pattern: graduate service/support from cost center foundation to revenue center (renewals, billable, enforcement). Generic naming only.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic job spine. Not legal tax advice on write-offs.
trigger_phrases: Support is only a cost center. Need path to services revenue: renewals, billable
Need playbook: Services Revenue Center Playbook
